package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerDatabaseAccessQueryInsideLoopWithoutBatching() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_database_access_query_inside_loop_without_batching"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Database access. Flag SQL queries issued inside loops where batching or IN queries can bound round trips."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
